subcodes.first_line: O ye who are nigh unto the Divine Threshold! Your letter hath been received and perused. Praise be to God, it beareth testimony to attraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مقرب درگاه کبریاء نامه شما رسید و ملاحظه گردید الحمد لله دلیل بر انجذاب
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Twelfth Imam; the Qa'im, @Letters of the Living
